steps.title: Substitute x = 0 into the function
steps.content:
We have $h(x) = x + b$. To use the condition $h(0) = 26$, substitute $x = 0$ into the function definition:
$$h(0) = 0 + b = b$$

steps.title: Apply the given condition to solve for b
steps.content:
We're told that $h(0) = 26$. From the substitution above, we know that $h(0) = b$. Therefore:
$$b = 26$$
